framing: EXPLORATORY. Workflow was declared complete after Phase 4 with 0/9 strategies passing the gate on cleaned + precommit-compliant data. Codex R8 (review of next-experiment proposals) recommended 3 bounded falsification tests against the null finding. These are NOT expected winners; they are low-probability falsification probes (R8 expected yields: 12-18%, 8-12%, 5-10% for steps 1/2/3). Pre-committing here so the Joint Holm family is honest about expanded multiplicity.
universe: S&P 500 historical membership (steps 1 + 2). Step 3 expands to S&P 600 (separate universe build).

walk_forward.note: Inherits Phase 4 floor for ML; rule-based strategies use natural earliest test start (2010-01-01) where data permits. Per-strategy floors documented below.

step_1_value_profitability.rationale_codex_r8: Novy-Marx (2013) showed gross profitability (GP/A = TTM gross profit / total assets) is a stronger quality metric than ROE for large-cap universes. Codex R8 ranked this #1 with expected yield 12-18% — best literature-backed extension of our current borderline value_earnings_yield finding (+0.354).

strategies.name: gross_profitability
strategies.rationale: Standalone GP/A factor. Top decile by ttm_gross_profit / total_assets, equal-weighted. Tests whether the Novy-Marx quality metric beats SPY directly.

strategies.name: value_profitability
strategies.rationale: AQR QMJ-lite composite: equal-weighted z-score sum of (earnings_yield, gross_profitability). Combines Novy-Marx quality with classic value. Most academically supported simple composite for the GP/A story.

step_2_ohlcv_phase4b.rationale_codex_r8: Falsification of 'ML failed because we omitted core liquidity/volume signals'. Codex R8 expected yield 8-12% — plausible uplift on ml_gkx_lightgbm's −0.218, but unlikely to flip clearly positive.
infrastructure_required: Extend src/youbet/etf/data.py::_download_prices to optionally return OHLCV (currently Close-only)
OHLCV snapshot cache parallel to existing close-only snapshot
Implement 6 volume/illiquidity features in gkx_chars.py: turn_22d, dolvol_22d, std_dolvol, ill_amihud, baspread_hl, zerotrade

strategies.name: ml_gkx_lightgbm_v20
strategies.rationale: Same LightGBM config as Phase 4; only feature set changes (14 → 20). Tests Amihud illiquidity contribution.

strategies.name: ml_gkx_elasticnet_v20
strategies.rationale: Same ElasticNet config as Phase 4; feature set 14 → 20.

step_3_sp600_smallcap.rationale_codex_r8: Codex R8 expected yield 5-10%, EXPLORATORY universe-shift only (not a likely winner). Israel-Moskowitz 2013 found value gets weaker in larger stocks but momentum has no reliable size relation; Asness 2018 'rescues' size only when controlling for junk; HXZ 2020 generally skeptical post-replication.
infrastructure_required: Build sp600_membership.csv (Wikipedia + Russell historical inclusions or alternative data source)
EDGAR cache extension for S&P 600 CIKs (potentially ~600 new tickers)
Rerun Phase 1 + Phase 3 + Phase 4 on the small-cap universe
step_3_sp600_smallcap.scope: Replicate the same N=4+3+2 = 9-strategy family on S&P 600. New benchmark: small-cap ETF? IJR (iShares S&P Small-Cap)? Or stay with SPY? Decision deferred until step 1+2 inform.
step_3_sp600_smallcap.expected_exs_band_post_decay: Per-strategy bands depend on benchmark choice; deferred.

statistical_treatment.holm_scope_authoritative: Joint Holm(Phase1 ∪ Phase3 ∪ Phase4 ∪ Phase7-step1) on S&P 500 universe = N=11 (existing 9 + 2 new). Step 2 (OHLCV) is REFIT of existing Phase 4 ML — replaces ml_gkx_elasticnet/lightgbm with v20 versions (still N=2 in Phase 4); Joint family stays N=11. Step 3 (S&P 600) is a SEPARATE universe — not joined into S&P 500 family.
gate_claims_publishable_only_if_all_true: exSh > 0.20 AND hAdj_up < 0.05 (joint N=11 Holm) AND ci_lo > 0
Strategy survives the same R6 contamination checks as Phase 4 (zero-day distribution, regime split, stripped-window Holm, coverage by year)

contamination_checks_required_before_any: Reuse the 12 R6 contamination checks for ALL new strategies
Step 2 OHLCV must verify volume data is also clean (not just close prices)

expected_outcome_per_codex_r8.step_1: 12-18% chance of CI-lower>0; most-likely outcome is similar to value_EY (point estimate near zero, CI crosses zero).
expected_outcome_per_codex_r8.step_2: 8-12% chance; most-likely outcome is ml_gkx_lightgbm point estimate moves from −0.218 toward zero but does not cross.
expected_outcome_per_codex_r8.step_3: 5-10% chance; most-likely outcome is S&P 600 results similar to S&P 500 with wider noise bands.
expected_outcome_per_codex_r8.overall: If all three are null, the workflow's 'no usable cross-sectional signal on free data' conclusion is much stronger. If one is positive, R6+R7+R8 contamination checks must be applied before publication.

termination_criteria: Step 1 null + step 2 null → declare workflow complete with strengthened null. Skip step 3.
Step 1 null + step 2 small positive shift → step 3 worth running.
Step 1 positive (CI lower > 0) → AUDIT before celebrating per CLAUDE.md #16, then continue R6 contamination policy.
Multi-day OS sleep cycles caused major delays in prior runs; use scripts/keep_awake_marker.py for any chained run.
